title: Villager Circus Tent
description: Adds a Villager Circus Tent to the world, featuring many different animals and plenty of villager visitors
body:
### Villager Circus Tent

**This mod adds a Villager Circus Tent to the game, featuring many different animals along with villager visitors and workers.**

![Tent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3be149521019ef8f7d09ebf548b8f31b80e9c71a.jpeg)

You’ll even find some circus themed loot inside the structure, as well as parrot cages in the back.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af950908ac5df62ae848ed09ae8309b69953a474.jpeg)

The Villager Circus Tent can spawn in the Plains, Sunflower Plains, Birch Forest, and regular Forest biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
